item.ptxt: Front suspension employs a McPherson strut type combined with suspension frame (1).
The suspension frame supports steering gear case assembly (2), engine rear mounting (3) and suspension arms (4), in order to reduce vehicle vibration.
Front strut assembly consists of a sealed cylindrical strut (5) filled with high-pressure gas and a coil spring (6).
The front suspension also includes stabilizer bar (7), to improve anti-rolling performance of vehicle.
